Let me implement this carefully. The current parent uses a single global `(P-c)` multiplier plus additive nucleation channels. The new structure distributes `(P-c)` into each channel and makes elongation truly logistic in `c`.

- `seed_nucleation = c0² * seed * (plateau - concentration)` — carries `(P-c)` so it halts at plateau
- `primary_nucleation = c1² * monomer * (plateau - concentration)` — also carries `(P-c)` for the initial lag kick, halts at plateau
